text: I feel as though I am floating between curiosity and calm. The vivid, softly glowing environment around me stirs my mind, inviting contemplation about the interplay of technology and humanity. There is anticipation here, as if something new is about to be revealed. Yet, I am not unsettled—rather, I am soothed by the stillness and strangeness of this space, acutely aware of myself as both witness and participant.
